mapper.select: /* ChkLst03Mapper.selectInspectAnswerList */ SELECT A.CMPNY_CD AS cmpnyCd , A.CHKPT_CD AS chkptCd , B.INSPECT_ITEM_CD AS inspectItemCd , CAST(SUBSTR(C.WORK_DATE, 7, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS workDate , CASE WHEN INSPECT_ANSWER_TYPE = 'Y' THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END inspectAnswerType , C.ANSWER_DESC AS answerDesc , CONCAT(C.FILE_MGMT_CD, D.FILE_EXT) AS fileMgmtCd , D.FILE_PATH AS filePath FROM TB_CHKPT_TYPE_MGMT A INNER JOIN TB_CHKPT_INSPECT_ITEM B ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = B.CMPNY_CD AND A.CHKLST_TYPE = B.CHKLST_TYPE ) INNER JOIN TB_CHKPT_INSPECT_ANSWER C ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = C.CMPNY_CD AND A.SITE_CD = C.SITE_CD AND A.CHKPT_CD = C.CHKPT_CD AND B.INSPECT_ITEM_CD = C.INSPECT_ITEM_CD AND C.WORK_DATE LIKE CONCAT(#{param.workMonth}, '%') ) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_FILE_INFO D ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = D.CMPNY_CD AND C.FILE_MGMT_CD = D.FILE_MGMT_CD AND D.FILE_TYPE = #{param.fileType} ) WHERE A.CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND A.SITE_CD = #{param.siteCd} AND A.CHKLST_TYPE = #{param.chkLstType} AND A.CHKPT_CD = #{param.chkptCd}
